description: The 2021 FDA accelerated approval of Biogen's aducanumab for Alzheimer's, despite a lack of clinical evidence of cognitive benefit and an expert panel's recommendation against it. This triggered internal FDA resignations.

key_events.description: FDA advisory committee votes overwhelmingly (10-0 with 1 abstention) against approval.
FDA grants accelerated approval, sparking outrage in the medical community.
Three members of the FDA advisory board resign in protest.
Medicare severely restricts coverage of the drug, effectively killing the commercial rollout.

calibration_notes: Captures the impact of expert panel rejection versus institutional regulatory decision-making.
